race.comment: SURPRISE COMING (6) has missed narrowly in his two runs back but should be at his top now. Drawn sticky but possesses enough early dash to offset quickly. Keeps the 2kg claimer to get him in well at the weights and should be right there at the business end again. MYSTIC WONDER (5) skipped through the conditions here three weeks ago when scoring comfortably. Not much tougher this time and keeps Holder. PLACO (7) has been good without striking through this campaign but should be at his top fourth-up. Will bounce to the front and give backers a bold sight. SNOOPY NOW (2) strips fitter third-up and is a distance specialist. Among the main hopes. FALAISE (9) caught the eye second-up here when flashing home from the rear. Shoulders peaks that measure up and is one to keep onside.
